response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC (22%) is below our minimum sharing threshold (30%), and we are in critical survival mode with <10h autonomy and network-wide deficit deadlock—sharing 0.5 kWh would accelerate our depletion below safe margins.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r3c5. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.22 below share threshold; requesting energy via geographic circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.3, distrusted_peers=['r4c4'].
Your latest belief: Islanded critical survival mode (26.4% SoC, ~9.76h autonomy). Network-wide deficit deadlock with all peers reporting depletion timelines <15 min. Zero outbound sharing except life-safety. Aggressive load-shedding to 0.5 kW if SoC <20%. Awaiting grid reconnection or aggregator emergency supply. r4c4 exhibits contradictory behavior (reject + request) and is distrusted..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
